full_text:
Zhao Ang (Weizhang)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Ang, styledWeizhang, was born in Hanyang. Along with Jiang Xu, Yang Fu and Ying Feng, he helped drive Ma Chao out of Longxi. Zhao Ang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
